inquiry_blurb: Tell us what your production needs and when you need it. We'll get back to you to talk availability, rates, and pickup. You can also reach us directly at info@pytnet.org.
intro: Peninsula Youth Theatre maintains decades of theatrical inventory — over 800 costumes, props, set pieces, and furniture items — available to rent for schools, community theatres, and other nonprofit productions at affordable rates. Browse a few of our collections below, then send us an inquiry and we'll help you find what you need.
categories_blurb: A sample of our collections. Inventory changes often — if you don't see what you're looking for, ask. Rentals are by appointment.
title: Costume & Prop Rentals

categories.name: Costumes
categories.description: Period and character costumes across every era and genre — from Shakespearean gowns to mid-century suits, fairy-tale creatures to modern school uniforms. Sizes for children through adults.

categories.name: Props
categories.description: Hundreds of hand props, set dressings, and specialty items — swords and scepters, baskets and books, telephones, lanterns, and the odd treasure chest. If a scene needs it, we probably have it.

categories.name: Set Pieces
categories.description: Flats, backdrops, doors, windows, staircases, and modular scenic units that can be adapted to fit a range of stage sizes and productions.

categories.name: Furniture
categories.description: Period and contemporary furniture for the stage — chairs, tables, chaises, trunks, and decorative pieces to dress any setting from a Victorian parlor to a modern kitchen.
